name: Chemical Plants
rationale: Large industrial sites can support recurring maintenance, fire watch, hole watch, turnaround support, and labor services.
This is the highest ceiling market, but hardest to enter without relationships, compliance, and procurement access.

name: Hospitals
rationale: Hospitals need recurring maintenance, facility support, emergency response, vendor reliability, and compliance-driven services.
Contract values can be meaningful, but procurement access may be slow.

name: Commercial Construction
rationale: Existing database already contains roofing, concrete, electrical, HVAC, plumbing, and contractor businesses.
This market is easier to contact quickly and can validate KTM offers faster than institutional buyers.
